research_notes: Research date: 2026-06-26. Website https://tsunagu.ltd/ accessible. Founded 2018 (LLC), incorporated 2019. Capital: 10M JPY. 15 employees. President: 田村逸人. Software development, system support, matching services. 3 offices: Yokohama, Fukuoka, Masuda (Shimane). ISMS at Masuda office. KIA member listed in master gist. Note: HQ moved to 獅子ケ谷 (230-0073) in Feb 2024, different from master gist address (230-0051 鶴見中央).
